global_description: A medium-sized bird with a compact body and a distinctive black and white plumage. It has a long, straight black bill and a slightly crested head. The wings and tail are black with white markings, and the underparts are predominantly white.

part_details.head: Slightly crested, predominantly black with white markings around the eyes.
part_details.bill: Long, straight, and black, ideal for fishing.
part_details.wings: Black with distinctive white markings, broad and pointed.
part_details.tail: Black with white tips, medium length.
part_details.underparts: Predominantly white, contrasting with the darker upperparts.

spatial_relations: The long bill extends from the front of the head.
The wings are positioned laterally on the body.
The tail extends from the rear of the body.
